title: Ohara Defies the Government
description: Professor Clover and the scholars of Ohara risk everything to protect forbidden history from the World Government.
scene: Across pages 6, 7, 8, 9, this part follows Nico Robin, Nico Olvia, Professor Clover, Jaguar D. Saul, Spandine. Professor Clover and the scholars of Ohara risk everything to protect forbidden history from the World Government.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Olvia
dialogue.text: Our duty is to deliver this message.

dialogue.speaker: Professor Clover
dialogue.text: I've been shot!! I... I'm done for!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: We'll soon unearth proof that they're studying

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: The government believes this to be

dialogue.speaker: World Government agent
dialogue.text: Do you know why that is...?

summary: Professor Clover and the scholars of Ohara risk everything to protect forbidden history from the World Government.
